title: rubus acutiformis
intro: Rubus acutiformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of raspberry that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus acutiformis include reducing fever, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
